extracted.title: TE Meter Underperformance -- UPDATE
extracted.description:
Texas Eastern Transmission's (TE) system has limited ability to absorb due pipeline imbalances from receipt and/or delivery point operators. TE is requiring the following meter operators to perform to scheduled quantities or confirmation restrictions will be made commensurate with anticipated physical deliveries:

Loc | Loc Name | County | Loc St | Zone
73417 | COPANO PROCESSING - HOUSTON CENTRAL / COLORADO CO., TX (REC) | Colorado | TX | 79501
73976 | MATTERHORN EXPRESS PIPELINE - HILLBOLDT ROAD AUSTIN CO, TX | Austin | TX | 79501
73608 | TGG PIPELINE - CENTRAL DELIVERY POINT | San Augustine | TX | 79502
73980 | LOUISIANA ENERGY GATEWAY (LEG) - COONIE JACKSON ROAD - BEAUREGARD | Beauregard | LA | 79503
74528 | DTM LEAP CAMERON EXTENSION AL CORMIER ROAD BEAUREGARD PARISH LA | Beauregard | LA | 79503
73698 | ACADIAN GAS-HAYNESVILLE EXTENSION P/L, PT.COUPEE PARISH, LA | Pointe Coupee | LA | 79504
75628 | BRIDGELINE - TALLYHO (D72628/R76628) | Iberville | LA | 79504
75614 | BOARDWALK STORAGE COMPANY LLC STORAGE -INJ/WD | Iberville | LA | 79504
74201 | ACCESS MIDSTREAM CLARKS MILL ROAD-JEFFERSON CO., OH | Jefferson | OH | 79508
74202 | ACCESS MIDSTREAM HIGHWAY 219 - JEFFERSON CO., OH | Jefferson | OH | 79508
73812 | MARKWEST UTICA SENECA MONROE CO., OH | Monroe | OH | 79508

If immediate action is not taken by the meter operators, reductions for Gas Day January 25, 2026, may be required.

TE will continue to monitor performance at these meters for future gas days.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
